title: Amazon SA I Solution Architect Salary | Levels.fyi
note: Average base $126,296; average TC $168,193 (stock $26,554/yr + bonus $15,343). Represents the full SA I tenure distribution (L2–L3 in this model's ladder). Already archived as faang-mag7-L3-2.json; cited here as the primary calibration anchor for L2 upper bound.
